result.anchor_clause: (a) the pro forma LTV Ratio, immediately after giving effect to the making of the Incremental Term Loans, shall be no more than 55%; ... (g) the All-In Yield applicable to any Incremental Term Loans shall be determined by the Borrowers and the applicable Lenders providing such Incremental Term Loans; provided, that if the All-In Yield of any such Incremental Term Loans that are incurred prior to the date that is six months after the Third Amendment Effective Date exceeds the All-In Yield on any then-outstanding 2025 Incremental Term Loans ... by more than 0.50%, the applicable margins applicable to such outstanding 2025 Incremental Term Loans shall be increased to the extent necessary so that the yield on such 2025 Incremental Term Loans is 0.50% less than the All-In Yield on such Incremental Term Loans.
result.collateral_agent: Wilmington Trust, National Association (as Collateral Administrator)
result.guarantors: Loan Parties (including the SPV Parties); Borrowers are AAdvantage Loyalty IP Ltd. (Loyalty Co) and American Airlines, Inc.; incremental debt may not be guaranteed by any Person other than a Loan Party
result.mfn_sunset_period: Six months after the Third Amendment Effective Date (MFN applies to Incremental Term Loans incurred prior to that date)
result.unrestricted_subsidiary_designation_flex: Section 5.06 governs Designation of Restricted and Unrestricted Subsidiaries; specific mechanics not reproduced in the provided excerpt. The AAdvantage IP/loyalty collateral structure is ring-fenced in SPV Parties and subject to the AAdvantage Agreement transfer/re-designation regime (Retained Agreements capped at less than 15.0% of AAdvantage Revenue on a pro forma basis).

financial_covenants.test_frequency: Pro forma upon incurrence of Incremental Term Loans / additional indebtedness
financial_covenants.quote: the pro forma LTV Ratio, immediately after giving effect to the making of the Incremental Term Loans, shall be no more than 55%

financial_covenants.kind: Peak Debt Service Coverage Cure (Section 2.24) — referenced in TOC
financial_covenants.quote: Section 2.24 Peak Debt Service Coverage Cure

baskets.name: 2025 Incremental Term Loans (this amendment)
baskets.quote: the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender hereby agree to make the 2025 Incremental Term Loans to the Borrowers on the Third Amendment Effective Date in the aggregate principal amount of $1,000,000,000.

baskets.name: Incremental Term Loans capacity (ratio-based, LTV governed)
baskets.value: Unlimited subject to pro forma LTV Ratio no more than 55%
baskets.quote: the pro forma LTV Ratio, immediately after giving effect to the making of the Incremental Term Loans, shall be no more than 55%

baskets.name: Permitted First Lien Notes / secured debt
baskets.value: Subject to pro forma LTV Ratio not more than 55%
baskets.quote: after giving effect to such indebtedness, the pro forma LTV Ratio shall not be more than 55%

baskets.name: Retained Agreements not transferred to Collateral (leakage limit)
baskets.value: less than 15.0% of AAdvantage Revenue on a pro forma basis
baskets.quote: the aggregate amount of payments in cash produced by the Retained Agreements not so transferred is less than 15.0% of the AAdvantage Revenue in such period (on a pro forma basis)

lme_vectors.rationale: Incremental Term Loans and Permitted First Lien Notes may be incurred without a hard dollar cap, subject only to a pro forma LTV Ratio of no more than 55%, no default, and MFN/maturity conditions.
lme_vectors.basis: Annex A Specified Terms condition (a) sets a 55% LTV incurrence test; Negative Covenants section likewise permits secured debt subject to 55% pro forma LTV; this amendment adds $1.0bn of incremental term loans.
lme_vectors.quote: the pro forma LTV Ratio, immediately after giving effect to the making of the Incremental Term Loans, shall be no more than 55%

lme_vectors.rationale: The amendment relies on Required Lenders consent under Section 10.08 for the Specified Amendment and pre-wires consent of the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender, but the sacred-rights / voting provisions of Section 10.08 are not reproduced, so priming protection cannot be confirmed.
lme_vectors.basis: Effectiveness of the Specified Amendment is tied to Required Lenders consent 'in accordance with the provisions of Section 10.08'; the substance of Section 10.08 is not in the excerpt.
lme_vectors.quote: the Required Lenders (and taking into account the consent of the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender and its assignees provided in the foregoing clause (a)) consenting to the terms of the Specified Terms ... in accordance with the provisions of Section 10.08

lme_vectors.rationale: The structure ring-fences AAdvantage IP in SPV Parties and requires transferred Retained Agreements to be pledged as first-lien Collateral, with leakage of unpledged Retained Agreements capped below 15% of AAdvantage Revenue, constraining value transfer away from lenders.
lme_vectors.basis: Retained Agreement transfer/re-designation regime caps unpledged cash flows at <15.0% of AAdvantage Revenue; transferred agreements 'shall be pledged as Collateral on a first lien basis'; dedicated IP Contribution Structure and SPV covenants (5.06-5.13).
lme_vectors.quote: Any Retained Agreements so transferred to the Borrower shall be pledged as Collateral on a first lien basis and shall thereafter be an AAdvantage Agreement

lme_vectors.rationale: Section 6.01 Restricted Payments exists but its baskets and thresholds are not reproduced in the provided excerpt, so restricted-payment leakage capacity cannot be assessed from the text.
lme_vectors.basis: Table of contents lists Section 6.01 Restricted Payments (p.151) but the operative RP baskets are not in the excerpt.

window:
Exhibit 10.1

THIRD AMENDMENT TO TERM LOAN CREDIT AND GUARANTY AGREEMENT

THIS THIRD AMENDMENT TO TERM LOAN CREDIT AND GUARANTY AGREEMENT(this
Amendment), is entered into as of
May 28, 2025, among AADVANTAGE LOYALTY IP LTD., an exempted company
incorporated with limited liability under the laws of the Cayman Islands, as
co-borrower (Loyalty Co), AMERICAN
AIRLINES, INC., a Delaware corporation, as co-borrower (American and together
with Loyalty Co, the Borrowers), BARCLAYS BANK PLC, as administrative agent
(together
with its permitted successors and assigns in such capacity, the Administrative
Agent) and Citibank, N.A., as the designated lender of the 2025 Incremental
Term Loans referred to below (in such capacity, the Designated 2025
Incremental Term Lender).

RECITALS:

A. The Borrowers, the Lenders party thereto, the Administrative Agent and the
other agents and arrangers party thereto are parties to that
certain Term Loan Credit and Guaranty Agreement, dated as of March 24, 2021 (as
amended by that certain First Amendment to Term Loan Credit and Guaranty
Agreement, dated as of June 26, 2023, that certain Second Amendment to Term
Loan
Credit and Guaranty Agreement, dated as of March 24, 2025, and as further
amended, supplemented, modified or waived from time to time prior to the Third
Amendment Effective Date (as defined below), the Existing Credit Agreement).
Each capitalized term used but not defined herein has the meaning assigned to
such term in the Credit Agreement (as defined below).

B. In accordance with Section 2.27 of the Credit Agreement, the Borrowers
hereby notify the Administrative Agent of its request for
Incremental Commitments (the 2025 Incremental Term Loan Commitment) for
$1,000,000,000 of Incremental Term Loans (the 2025 Incremental Term Loans) to
be made available by the Designated 2025 Incremental Term
Lender in the amount specified therefor on hereto.

C. The Borrowers, the Administrative Agent, and the Designated 2025
Incremental Term Lender wish to amend the Existing Credit Agreement to provide
for (i) the incurrence of 2025 Incremental Term Loans and (ii) certain other
modifications to the Credit Agreement, in each case, on the terms and subject
to
the conditions set forth herein.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the foregoing, and for other good and
valuable consideration, the
receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, the parties hereto
hereby agree as follows:

. Effective as of the Third Amendment Effective Date, the Borrowers, the
Administrative Agent, and the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender agree
that the Credit Agreement is amended to delete the stricken text (indicated
textually in the same manner as the following example: strickcn text) and to
add the bolded, underlined text (indicated textually in the same manner as the
following example: underlined text) as set forth in the pages of the Credit
Agreement attached as Exhibit Ahereto; and

.The parties hereto agree that, as of the Third Amendment Effective Date and in
connection with this Amendment:

(a) Citi (as defined
in the Engagement Letter dated May 6, 2025, by and among, inter alios,
American, Citi (as defined therein) and the other Lead Arrangers (as defined
therein) party thereto from time to time (as amended, modified, or supplemented
from time
to time, the )) shall be designated as, and perform the roles associated
with, a joint lead arranger and bookrunner and structuring agent.

(b) Each of Bank of America, N.A. and Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation shall
be designated as, and perform the roles associated with, a
joint lead arranger and bookrunner.

(c) Each of Barclays Bank PLC, BNP Paribas Securities Corp., Credit Agricole
Corporate and Investment
Bank, Deutsche Bank Securities Inc., Goldman Sachs Lending Partners LLC,
JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., Morgan Stanley Senior Funding, Inc., MUFG Bank,
Ltd., Bank of China, New York Branch, ICBC Standard Bank PLC, Mizuho Bank,
Ltd., Natixis, New York
Branch, NatWest Markets Plc, U.S. Bank National Association and BOK Financial
Securities, Inc. shall be designated as, and perform the roles associated with,
a joint bookrunner.

.

(a) Subject to the satisfaction (or waiver) of the conditions set forth in
Section Five hereof, the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender
hereby agree to make the 2025 Incremental Term Loans to the Borrowers on the
Third Amendment Effective Date in the aggregate principal amount of
$1,000,000,000.

(b) On the Third Amendment Effective Date, the Designated 2025 Incremental Term
Lender shall fund in cash to the Borrowers an amount equal to
the 2025 Incremental Term Loan Term Commitment of the Designated 2025
Incremental Term Lender.

(c) The 2025 Incremental Term Loans shall
be initially incurred as SOFR Loans. Each such Borrowing of 2025 Incremental
Term Loans shall be subject to an Interest Period which commences on the Third
Amendment Effective Date and ends on the July 2025 Payment Date.

(d) The Administrative Agent confirms it has received sufficient notice
pursuant to the requirements of Section 2.27(a) of the Existing
Credit Agreement in connection with the establishment of the 2025 Incremental
Term Loan Commitments.

.

(a) The Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender and any assignee of any 2025
Incremental Term
Loans hereby irrevocably consents to the terms and amendments set forth and
described in (the ) and, as applicable, irrevocably authorizes the
Administrative Agent and the Borrowers to enter into one
or more future amendments the () to implement any or all the Specified Terms,
together with any additional amendments and changes of a technical, mechanical,
immaterial, innocuous or

conforming nature as the Administrative Agent and Borrowers may determine are
necessary to implement the Specified Terms. The Designated 2025 Incremental
Term Lender and the Administrative Agent
further agree that no further consent from the Designated 2025 Incremental Term
Lender (nor any assignee of any 2025 Incremental Term Loans) shall be required,
nor shall the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender (nor any assignee of any
2025
Incremental Term Loans) be required to execute the Specified Amendment, to
effectuate and implement the Specified Terms.

(b) Such
Specified Amendment shall become effective upon (i) the Required Lenders (and
taking into account the consent of the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender
and its assignees provided in the foregoing clause (a)) consenting to the terms
of the
Specified Terms and authorizing the Administrative Agent and the Borrowers to
enter into the Specified Amendment to effectuate the Specified Terms, together
with any additional amendments and changes of a technical, mechanical,
immaterial, innocuous
or conforming nature as the Administrative Agent and Borrowers may determine
are necessary or advisable to implement the Specified Terms, in accordance with
the provisions of Section 10.08 or (ii) if earlier, the date on which the 2025
Replacement Term Loans are repaid, repriced or replaced, and the Administrative
Agent and Borrowers enter into the Specified Amendment to effectuate the
Specified Terms, together with any additional amendments and changes of a
technical, mechanical,
immaterial, innocuous or conforming nature as the Administrative Agent and
Borrowers may determine are necessary or advisable to implement the Specified
Term, in accordance with the provisions of Section 10.08. The date on which the
Specified
Amendment becomes effective shall be the . For the avoidance of doubt, in
each case of the foregoing clauses (b)(i) and (b)(ii), the Administrative Agent
will enter into the foregoing amendments
(including the Specified Amendment) upon the Borrowers instruction so long as
the requisite consent for such amendments is obtained in accordance with the
provisions of Section 10.08 (taking into account the consent of the Designated
2025
Incremental Term Lender and its assignees provided in the foregoing clause
(a)).

(c) Each party hereto acknowledges and agrees that the
Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lenders consent is binding on any future
successors, assigns, and transferees of such Designated 2025 Incremental Term
Lenders interest in the 2025 Incremental Term Loans.

. The provisions of Section One of this Amendment shall become effective on the
date
(the Third Amendment Effective Date) when each of the following conditions
specified below shall have been satisfied:

(a) the Borrowers, the Administrative Agent, and the Designated 2025
Incremental Term Lender shall have signed a counterpart hereof (whether
the same or different counterparts);

(b) all reasonable invoiced
out-of-pocket expenses incurred by the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender
and the Administrative Agent pursuant to of the
Credit Agreement or Section 5 of the Engagement Letter (including the
reasonable and documented fees, charges and disbursements of counsel) and all
accrued and unpaid fees, owing and payable under the Existing Credit Agreement
(including any
fees agreed to in connection with this Amendment) shall have been paid to the
extent invoiced at least two (2) Business Days prior to the Third Amendment
Effective Date (or such shorter period as may be agreed by the Borrowers);

(c) the Administrative Agent shall have received a customary written opinion of
(i) Latham & Watkins LLP, special New York counsel for the Borrowers and (ii)
Maples and Calder (Cayman) LLP, special Cayman Islands counsel for the
Borrowers, in each case addressed to the Administrative Agent and the
Designated
2025 Incremental Term Lender, and dated the Third Amendment Effective Date;

(d) the Administrative Agent shall have received a certificate
of the Secretary or Assistant Secretary (or similar Responsible Officer), dated
the Third Amendment Effective Date (i) certifying as to the incumbency and
specimen signature of each Responsible Officer of each Borrower executing this
Amendment
or any other document delivered by it in connection herewith (such certificate
to contain a certification of another Responsible Officer of that entity as to
the incumbency and signature of the Responsible Officer signing the certificate
referred to
in this ), (ii) attaching each constitutional document of each Borrower or
certifying that each constitutional document of such Borrower previously
delivered to the Administrative Agent has not been amended, supplemented,
rescinded
or otherwise modified and remains in full force and effect as of the date
hereof, (iii) attaching resolutions of each Borrower approving the transactions
contemplated by this Amendment and (iv) attaching a certificate of good
standing for
each Borrower from the relevant jurisdiction of such entitys incorporation or
formation, dated as of a recent date, as to the good standing of that entity
(to the extent available in the applicable jurisdiction);

(e) the Administrative Agent shall have received an Officers Certificate
signed by the Borrowers certifying (A) the truth in all
material respects of the representations and warranties contained

. In order to induce the Designated 2025 Incremental Term Lender and
the Administrative Agent to enter into this Amendment, each Borrower represents
and warrants, on behalf of itself and its Subsidiaries, to the Designated 2025
Incremental Term Lender and the Administrative Agent, that on and as of the
date hereof
after giving effect to this Amendment:

(a) immediately before and after giving effect to this Amendment and the
Borrowings pursuant
thereto, no Early Amortization Event, no Default or Event of Default shall have
occurred and be continuing, or result from this Amendment, on the Third
Amendment Effective Date; and

(b) the representations and warranties contained in the Credit Agreement and
the other Loan Documents (other than representations and
warranties set forth in Sections 3.05(b), 3.06, 3.09(a) and 3.21 of the Credit
Agreement) are true and correct in all material respects on and as of the date
hereof with the same effect as if made on and as of the date hereof or, in the
case of any
representations and warranties that expressly relate to an earlier date, as
though made as of such date; provided, that any representation or warranty that
is qualified by materiality (it being understood that any representation or
warranty
that excludes circumstances that would not result in a Material Adverse
Change or Material Adverse Effect shall not be considered (for purposes of

. Each Borrower hereby acknowledges that it has reviewed the terms and

Term Loans incurred pursuant to this Amendment) pursuant to the Collateral

. On and

party hereto as a lender (the
Lenders), BARCLAYS BANK PLC, as administrative agent for the Lenders

INTRODUCTORY STATEMENT

The
Borrowers have applied to the Lenders for a term loan facility of
$3,500,000,000 as set forth herein.

The proceeds of the Term Loans will
be used to pay related transaction costs, fees and expenses, to fund the
Reserve Account (as defined below) and to provide the American Intercompany
Loan (as defined below) to American, as borrower, which may be used (i) to
repay indebtedness
under that certain Loan and Guarantee Agreement dated September 25, 2020, as
amended from time to time, by and among American and Parent and the U.S.
Department of Treasury as a lender and certain other revolving indebtedness and
(ii) any
general corporate purposes deemed necessary by American.

Accordingly, the parties hereto hereby agree as follows:

SECTION 1.

DEFINITIONS

Section 1.01 . Unless otherwise defined herein, terms defined in the Collateral
Agency and Accounts Agreement shall
have the same meaning when used herein (including in the introductory
statement) notwithstanding any termination thereof. When used herein, the
following terms shall have the following meanings:

2025 Incremental Term Loan Commitment shall mean the Term Loan Commitment of
the 2025 Incremental Term Loan Lender
to make the 2025 Incremental Term Loans pursuant to the Third Amendment.

2025 Incremental Term Loan Commitment Schedule shall mean the schedule of
2025 Incremental Term Loan Commitments of the 2025 Incremental Term Lender
provided to the Borrower on the Third Amendment Effective Date by the
Administrative Agent pursuant to the Third Amendment.

2025 Incremental Term Loan Lender shall mean each Lender having a
2025 Incremental Term Loan Commitment or, as the case may be, with an
outstanding 2025 Incremental Term Loan.

2025 Incremental Term Loans shall be the Incremental Term Loans incurred
pursuant to the Third Amendment.

2025 Replacement Term Lender shall mean each Lender having a Term Loan
Commitment to provide 2025 Replacement Term Loans or, as the case may be, with
an outstanding 2025 Replacement Term Loan.

2025 Replacement Term Loans shall mean the Term Loans incurred pursuant to
the Second Amendment.

2025 Replacement Term Loan Commitment shall mean the Term Loan Commitment of
each 2025 Replacement Term Lender to
make 2025 Replacement Term Loans pursuant to the Second Amendment.

2025 Replacement Term Loan Commitment Schedule shall mean the schedule of
2025 Replacement Term Loan Commitments of each 2025 Replacement Term Lender
provided to the Borrowers on the Second Amendment Effective Date by the
Administrative Agent pursuant to the Second
Amendment.

40 Act shall mean the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended.

AAdvantageAgreements shall mean all currently existing, future and successor
co-branding agreements, partnering agreements, airline-to-airline frequent
flyer program agreements, or similar agreements related to
or entered into in connection with the AAdvantage Program, including each
Material AAdvantage Agreement, but excluding (i) any American Airline Business
Agreements and (ii) any Retained Agreements.

AAdvantage Customer Data shall mean all data owned or purported to be owned,
or later developed or acquired and
owned or purported to be owned, by American, Loyalty Co, Parent or its
